description_long: This sconce features a central metallic hub from which six arms radiate outward, each ending in a spherical glass bulb. The bulbs are evenly spaced around the fixture, creating a starburst or molecular structure appearance. The arms and central hub are finished in a metallic, likely brass or chrome, giving the fixture a sleek and modern look. The bulbs themselves are clear or slightly tinted, allowing the internal light sources to be visible. The fixture is suspended from a single rod attached to a circular ceiling mount. The overall design is symmetrical and visually balanced, with a contemporary aesthetic suitable for urban interiors.
description: A modern, metallic sconce with six spherical glass bulbs radiating from a central hub, suspended from a ceiling mount. The design is sleek and symmetrical, with a starburst appearance.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the sconce from a slight angle, highlighting the arrangement of the six glass bulbs and the metallic arms radiating from the center.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a more direct front view, emphasizing the symmetry and even spacing of the bulbs around the central hub.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a similar angle to view 0 but from the opposite side, showing the alignment and spacing of the bulbs and arms.
description_view_3: View 3 is a direct view from below, displaying the circular arrangement of the bulbs and the central mounting rod.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, starburst design with clean lines and a metallic finish, reminiscent of mid-century modern and contemporary styles. The use of spherical glass bulbs and a symmetrical arrangement gives it a sophisticated, minimalist look.
